exercises.name: Push-Ups
exercises.instructions: Keep your core tight and butt even with your back
exercises.safetyCues: Don't let your lower back sag.

exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
exercises.instructions: Standard jumping jacks, maintain a steady rhythm.
exercises.safetyCues: Land softly on the balls of your feet.

exercises.name: Forearm Plank
exercises.instructions: Hold a straight line from head to heels.
exercises.safetyCues: Keep your hips level, no sagging.

exercises.name: Flutter Kicks
exercises.instructions: Keep legs straight and alternate small kicks.
exercises.safetyCues: Press your lower back firmly into the floor.

exercises.name: High Knees
exercises.instructions: Drive your knees up to waist height.
exercises.safetyCues: Land softly on the balls of your feet.

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.instructions: Drop to a plank, push-up, jump up.
exercises.safetyCues: Maintain core control during the jump back.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.instructions: In a plank position, drive knees to chest alternately.
exercises.safetyCues: Keep your shoulders directly over your wrists.

exercises.name: Tricep Dips
exercises.instructions: Use a bench or chair, lower body until elbows are at 90 degrees.
exercises.safetyCues: Keep your back close to the bench.

exercises.name: Arm Circles
exercises.instructions: Small, controlled circles forward, then backward.
exercises.safetyCues: Keep your shoulders pulled down and back.
